summary: Surgical entry/exit continuity polish: the opening now anchors directly to the prior chapter's alarm-to-pager beat, and the closing now lands on Ina physically arriving at her father's apartment for a cleaner handoff into Chapter 3.
edits: Reordered the opening so the 10:00 p.m. pager buzz leads, explicitly tying to the Chapter 1 setup.
Tightened the ending into two short beats and ended on Ina carrying eggs up to her father's apartment.
